caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a matching green baseball cap is speaking into a professional microphone while wearing black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with framed photographs on the wall behind him and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and grey pants standing nearby. Clothing racks are visible in the background. Throughout the sequence, the man is gesturing with his right hand, moving it from a higher position toward the microphone as he speaks. A circular logo featuring the text "SIDE" is visible on the left side of the screen, and the red text "BOLLY TOY" appears on the right. The man's facial expression and hand gestures shift slightly as he continues his conversation, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
